report_text: I kept visual focus on the image and felt in control.
Breath steady and bodily calm; the picture remained clear.
Effortful but automatic at times; the voice in my head was quiet.
Strong agency and a clear visual image; muscle relaxed.
No sound distractions and I maintained control of attention.
Lost control as the image drifted; bodily tension rose.
Automatic thoughts with a visual picture and a faint heartbeat.
Heard a distant voice; agency felt low; breath shallow.
Mind wandered to a bodily sensation and effort to refocus.
An image popped in with little control and an auditory humming.
